description: This is an HTML file containing the front-end user interface for a database visualizer. It includes structure, styling, and JavaScript code that interacts with a backend API to fetch and display database names, tables, and table data dynamically.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches and displays list of databases from the backend API.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the list of databases and resets the UI state.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Handles expanding/collapsing the list of tables for a selected database.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Fetches and displays the tables for a selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Fetches and renders data for a selected table.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Creates the HTML table structure for displaying data.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Creates individual table cell HTML, handling nulls, large objects, and long text.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content for better readability.
